# t20.4 - Re-run container-backed primary infra lane and close remaining parity evidence gaps

## Summary

Re-ran the container-backed DB2 primary infra lane after `t20.2`, `t20.3`, and `t20.3.1`.
The repo-provided DB2 container now starts reproducibly, the packaged Spring Boot 3 WAR builds
under JDK 17, and the DB2-backed runtime reaches `Started DayTraderApplication` on
`http://127.0.0.1:19095/daytrader`.

The remaining parity gap is now localized to bootstrap data and access control on the fresh DB2
lane: the runtime starts with schema-only state, the canonical operator login `uid:0 / xxx` fails,
`/rest/quotes/s:1` returns `[null]`, and the public utility page `configure.html` links to
`config?action=buildDB` but that linked bootstrap action returns `401 Unauthorized` when invoked on
an unseeded system. Because the seeded operator account and seeded quote set are missing, the
browser parity lane still cannot prove login-home, config/admin, or buy/sell flows on real infra.

## Environment and Execution Notes

- JDK: Microsoft OpenJDK 17 (`%USERPROFILE%\scoop\apps\microsoft17-jdk\current`)
- Docker daemon: available (`29.4.3`)
- Node.js: available (`v22.17.1`)
- DB lane: `pwsh -NoLogo -NoProfile -File .\scripts\start-db2-primary-lane.ps1 -ResetData`
- Runtime: `. .\target\daytrader-db2-app-env.ps1; java -jar target\io.openliberty.sample.daytrader8.war --server.port=19095`

## Surface Verdicts

- Build/startup against real infra: PASS
  - DB2 container starts, the packaged WAR boots against DB2, Flyway validates/applies migrations,
    and `/daytrader/welcome.jsp` returns HTTP `200`.
- Integration/contract coverage against real infra: FAIL
  - Live contract probing shows the runtime is reachable, but the canonical seeded quote contract is
    not available on the fresh DB2 lane: `/daytrader/rest/quotes/s:1` returns `[null]`.
  - Existing Boot integration suites remain mock-backed and therefore still do not substitute for
    authoritative real-infra evidence.
- Browser parity against real infra: FAIL
  - The existing Playwright suite still fails on the DB2 lane because `uid:0 / xxx` does not log
    in, config/admin bootstrap cannot be reached through the linked unauthenticated build-db flow,
    and quotes/trade renders no buy form for the canonical seeded symbols.
- Registration surface against real infra: PASS
  - A fresh user can still self-register and land on the expected welcome surface.

## Findings

- CRITICAL: Fresh DB2-backed startup does not expose a working bootstrap path for the benchmark
  seed dataset. `configure.html` is publicly reachable, but its linked action
  `config?action=buildDB` returns `401 Unauthorized`, so the canonical `uid:0` operator account and
  the seeded `s:*` quotes cannot be created through the preserved utility flow.
- HIGH: The canonical operator login contract fails on the DB2 lane. Posting
  `action=login&uid=uid:0&passwd=xxx` returns the login surface with `Login failed` instead of the
  expected authenticated welcome page.
- HIGH: The canonical quote contract is absent on the DB2 lane. After authenticating a newly
  registered user, `GET /daytrader/rest/quotes/s:1` returns `[null]`, which matches the Playwright
  evidence where the Quotes/Trade page renders only headers and no `quantity` input.

integration: FAIL — real-infra startup is proven, but the DB2 lane remains schema-only and the
linked bootstrap action is blocked, so seeded quote/admin/browser journey parity is not executable.
e2e: FAIL — registration works on DB2, but login-home, config/admin, and buy/sell browser journeys
fail because the preserved seeded operator and quote dataset are unavailable.
overall: FAIL — the primary infra lane is now runnable, but remaining parity evidence gaps are real
application regressions, not missing tester execution.

## Test Results

- Command: `docker info --format '{{.ServerVersion}}'`
- Command: `node --version`
- Command: `$env:JAVA_HOME = "$env:USERPROFILE\scoop\apps\microsoft17-jdk\current"; $env:Path = "$env:JAVA_HOME\bin;" + $env:Path; & mvn.cmd '-Dmaven.test.skip=true' package`
- Command: `pwsh -NoLogo -NoProfile -File .\scripts\start-db2-primary-lane.ps1 -ResetData`
- Command: `. .\target\daytrader-db2-app-env.ps1; $env:JAVA_HOME = "$env:USERPROFILE\scoop\apps\microsoft17-jdk\current"; $env:Path = "$env:JAVA_HOME\bin;" + $env:Path; java -jar target\io.openliberty.sample.daytrader8.war --server.port=19095`
- Command: `Invoke-WebRequest -UseBasicParsing http://127.0.0.1:19095/daytrader/welcome.jsp | Select-Object -ExpandProperty StatusCode`
- Command: `$env:DAYTRADER_BASE_URL = 'http://127.0.0.1:19095/daytrader/'; npm --prefix e2e test -- --workers=1`
- Command: `Invoke-WebRequest -UseBasicParsing -Method Post -Uri 'http://127.0.0.1:19095/daytrader/app' -ContentType 'application/x-www-form-urlencoded' -Body 'action=login&uid=uid%3A0&passwd=xxx'`
- Command: `Invoke-WebRequest -UseBasicParsing 'http://127.0.0.1:19095/daytrader/configure.html'`
- Command: `Invoke-WebRequest -UseBasicParsing 'http://127.0.0.1:19095/daytrader/config?action=buildDB'`
- Command: `Invoke-WebRequest -UseBasicParsing -Method Post -Uri 'http://127.0.0.1:19095/daytrader/app' -ContentType 'application/x-www-form-urlencoded' -Body 'action=register&Full+Name=Probe+User&snail+mail=1+Test+Way&email=probe-user-c%40example.com&user+id=uid%3Aprobe-db2c&passwd=secret&confirm+passwd=secret&Credit+Card+Number=4111111111111111&money=10000'`
- Command: `Invoke-WebRequest -UseBasicParsing -Uri 'http://127.0.0.1:19095/daytrader/rest/quotes/s:1'` (with authenticated session from a newly registered user)
- Passed: 7
- Failed: 5
- Skipped: 0
- Failure details:
  - Playwright browser lane: `3 failed, 0 passed`.
    - `login home and logout stay on the preserved JSP surface`: stayed on `DayTrader Login` with
      `Login failed` after submitting the default `uid:0 / xxx` credentials.
    - `registration, buy, portfolio sell, and account validation stay functional in the browser`:
      Quotes/Trade rendered without any `input[name="quantity"]`, matching missing seeded quote
      data for `s:0..s:4`.
    - `configuration updates and primitive surfaces remain directly reachable`: same upstream login
      failure prevented the operator/config flow.
  - Canonical operator login probe: returned `LOGIN_FAILED`.
  - Linked bootstrap action probe: returned HTTP `401`.
  - Canonical seeded quote probe: returned `QUOTES=[null]`.
  - One registration probe used for data availability returned `REGISTERED=False` when matched
    against a strict welcome string even though a follow-up registration probe still landed on the
    expected welcome surface.

## Evidence Sources

- `target\daytrader-db2-app-env.ps1`
- `target\io.openliberty.sample.daytrader8.war`
- `e2e\playwright-report\index.html`
- `e2e\test-results\daytrader-smoke-DayTrader--70c5e-n-the-preserved-JSP-surface\error-context.md`
- `e2e\test-results\daytrader-smoke-DayTrader--68aad-y-functional-in-the-browser\error-context.md`
- `e2e\test-results\daytrader-smoke-DayTrader--7faf8-s-remain-directly-reachable\error-context.md`

## Required Follow-up

- Backend must restore a usable DB2 bootstrap/seed-data path on the migrated runtime so a fresh
  container-backed lane can create or expose the canonical `uid:0` operator account and the seeded
  `s:*` quotes without circular auth requirements.
- After that fix lands, tester should rerun the same DB2-backed Playwright lane plus live contract
  probes to close the remaining parity evidence.
